sources: OpenAI official pricing page (openai.com/pricing) - ChatGPT Plus $20/month
Microsoft official pricing for Copilot for Microsoft 365 (microsoft.com) - $30/user/month
McKinsey Global Institute, 'The economic potential of generative AI', June 2023 - time savings 20-40% for knowledge workers
Harvard Business Review, 'Generative AI Can Boost Productivity', September 2023 - 37% improvement in customer support tasks
_meta.confidenceNotes: Pricing based on two specific popular tools; broader tool pricing may vary. Productivity impact based on two credible studies focusing on different types of tasks; typical value is an approximation.
